ab: a izua i tjumaq ti vuvu i vavayan?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: izua,na taqed i qarengan timadju.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: a izua i tjumaq ti vuvu i vavayan?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: neka, tjau vaik a casav, nu qazemezemetjang kimangetjez.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: a izua i tjumaq ti vuvu i uqaljay?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: uzai i tjaivavau sau kimu a sema vavau timadju.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: a izua i tjumaq?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: ti Puljaljuyan, sicuayan anga ku pinacunan tjanusun, na venala sun?
ch: B:是Puljaljuyan阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Puljaljuyan. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: na venala ken! kemim aken tjanusun a maljavar.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: inu a su kama?
en: Where is your father?

ab: seman djamadjamay i kakesan timadju, ku vaikav a qivu.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: na vaik anga semainu ti Muni?
en: Where did Muni go?

ab: vaikanga sema pukukan a djemekep ta kuka timadju.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: vuvu i uqaljay, mangtjez amen.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: neka i tjemaq a nu vava a uqaljay, vaik anga sema vavua, tjitjumatjumaqu a kitjekaljava ta mangetjez timadju.
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: kama i Puljaljuyan mangtjez sun?
en: Uncle Puljaljuayn, you’re here!

ab: sicuayan anga ku pinacunan tjanusun, nameqacanga sun.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: maleva ken aravac a pacun tjanusun.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: ku sipavavay aicu a pangudralj tjanumun, pasa zuauanga ta pingsiang.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: cuacuayanga inika mangtjengtjez, ku qaqivuav tiamadju a mapuljat ta keman.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: maya mavarung, nanguaq a temekel aken ta utja kaljavaljavari a sema pulaulangan.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: masalu ta su paiadja, uri vaik anga ken a cemikel.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: tjau papacain aicu a kuka, kacuanga cemikel ljenguaquanga keman.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
